class.name: PlatformVideoStreamPlayback
class.brief_description: The [VideoStreamPlayback] driving hardware-decoded, zero-copy native video playback for [PlatformVideoStream].
class.description: Instantiated by [PlatformVideoStream] to drive the platform's hardware decoder (AVFoundation on macOS, Windows Media Foundation on Windows) and present decoded frames to the GPU with no CPU copy. Not created directly — a stock [VideoStreamPlayer] obtains it by instantiating [PlatformVideoStream].

method.name: get_color_info
method.description: Returns a [Dictionary] with the parsed/negotiated colorimetry metadata for the most recently opened clip. The dictionary contains the following keys: [code]matrix[/code] (int): YCbCr matrix — 0=Unspecified, 1=BT.709, 2=BT.601, 3=BT.2020. [code]primaries[/code] (int): Color primaries — 0=Unspecified, 1=BT.709, 2=BT.601-625 (PAL), 3=BT.601-525 (NTSC), 4=BT.2020, 5=DCI-P3. [code]transfer[/code] (int): Transfer function — 0=Unspecified, 1=BT.709, 2=PQ (SMPTE ST 2084), 3=HLG. [code]range[/code] (int): Video range — 0=Unspecified, 1=Video (limited), 2=Full. [code]bit_depth[/code] (int): Bits per channel (8 for 8-bit sources, 10 for 10-bit sources). [code]output_mode[/code] (int): The pipeline's effective output mode — 0=SDR, 1=HDR. Always present, regardless of the clip's own colorimetry. Untagged clips (no embedded colorimetry metadata) return BT.709, video-range defaults, which is pixel-identical to the legacy hard-coded conversion shader. Callable once the stream has been opened by [VideoStreamPlayer] (i.e. after load succeeds), before playback starts.

members.member: Selects the pipeline's output mode: [code]0[/code] for SDR (RGBA8) or [code]1[/code] for HDR (RGBA16F, scene-linear, 1.0 = 203-nit Reference White). Toggling at runtime forces a pipeline rebuild. Prefer driving this through [member PlatformVideoStream.output_mode] instead of setting it here directly — this property does not mirror back to the stream resource.
